rows.label: qev055104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Was the strange restlessness in the Ovah lately
caused by this event...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055104_MSG0003
rows.name:
The Ovah is restless...
I've felt this sensation once before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055104_MSG0004
rows.name: Right after that, my comrades were executed by the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055104_MSG0005
rows.name:
I do not know what will happen,
but it is undoubtedly telling me that an ominous future
lies on the path ahead.[ST:wait ]
